hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '(pnpm-lock\.yaml|package-lock\.json|\.env$|\.env\.|node_modules/)' && echo 'Blocked: protected file — do not edit lock files, .env, or node_modules' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '^git commit' && echo 'Reminder: consider running the code-reviewer agent before committing.' >&2 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '^git commit' && cd "$(jq -r '.cwd // "."')" 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm exec prettier --write 'packages/**/src/**/*.ts' 'packages/**/__tests__/**/*.ts' --log-level silent 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
